title: cash_sol Accounting Fix — Sell Proceeds Observability and Phantom Buy Debit
summary: Two targeted additions to cash_sol accounting. (1) Observability on successful sell: added proceeds_source field ('output_amount') to SELL TradeDecision metadata and a cash_sol_credited event after every confirmed sell credit — makes the credit auditable without changing any accounting logic. When output_amount=None the existing RECONCILE_PENDING path is fully preserved; the quote is NOT used as a credit source. (2) Rank 3 phantom-debit marker: on the SETTLEMENT_UNCONFIRMED buy path, position.pending_proceeds_sol is now set to size_sol immediately after cash_sol -= size_sol, and a cash_sol_debited_pending event is emitted — makes the phantom-debit risk observable without reversing the debit. No changes to realized_sol computation, no changes to RECONCILE_PENDING semantics. Zero CU impact.

regression_fix_notes.root_cause_1: test_sell_proceeds_unknown_decrements_qty_and_prevents_retry: The original T-004 attempt added a quote-fallback credit when output_amount=None. DummyExecutor in test_position_exits.py always returns out_amount_atomic=1_000_000_000 in its quote, so the fallback fired and credited cash_sol, resolving the position as PARTIAL instead of POSITION_RECONCILE_PENDING. Fix: quote fallback removed entirely. output_amount=None always goes to RECONCILE_PENDING.
regression_fix_notes.root_cause_2: test_realized_proceeds_not_from_quote_when_execution_missing: Same quote-fallback. DummyExecutor in test_recovery_and_state.py returns out_amount_atomic=500, so realized_sol was credited with 500/1e9=5e-7 instead of remaining 0.0. Fix: same — quote fallback removed. The test name explicitly encodes the contract: quote must not be used for realized proceeds.

_attempt_exit: Added out_sol/proceeds_source variables (proceeds_source='output_amount' only when output_amount is not None)
Added proceeds_source to SELL TradeDecision metadata
Added cash_sol_credited event emission after exit_success when out_sol is not None
output_amount=None path: identical to pre-T-004 RECONCILE_PENDING behavior, comment updated only
_maybe_open_positions_settlement_unconfi: Added position.pending_proceeds_sol = float(size_sol) after cash_sol -= size_sol
Added cash_sol_debited field to BUY TradeDecision metadata

why_safe: output_amount=None path in _attempt_exit is identical to pre-T-004: RECONCILE_PENDING, no cash_sol credit, no realized_sol credit.
cash_sol_credited event is additive only — fires after the existing exit_success event when out_sol is not None.
pending_proceeds_sol field existed in PositionState (models.py:131, default=0.0) — no model schema change.
No debit reversal logic added — marker is purely additive.
No new Birdeye or Jupiter calls — zero CU impact.
All 209 existing tests preserved. 4 new focused tests added (213 total).

new_events_emitted.name: cash_sol_credited
new_events_emitted.when: Confirmed sell where result.output_amount is not None (existing happy path only)

new_events_emitted.name: sell_proceeds_unknown
new_events_emitted.when: Confirmed sell where output_amount=None (pre-existing path, now with event)
new_events_emitted.note: This event was already present before T-004; not new.

new_events_emitted.name: cash_sol_debited_pending
new_events_emitted.when: Buy with SETTLEMENT_UNCONFIRMED status after cash_sol debit

required_validation.name: confirm_no_cu_change
required_validation.command: git diff HEAD -- creeper_dripper/engine/trader.py | grep -E '^\+' | grep -E 'birdeye\.|token_overview|token_security|token_holder|token_creation_info|getSignatureStatuses|native_sol_balance' | grep -v '^\+\+\+' || echo 'CLEAN: no new Birdeye/RPC calls'

commit_message:
fix: add cash_sol accounting observability and phantom buy debit marker (T-004)

On confirmed sell with output_amount present: emit cash_sol_credited event
with proceeds_source='output_amount' and add proceeds_source to SELL
TradeDecision metadata. output_amount=None path is unchanged: RECONCILE_PENDING,
cash_sol not credited, quote NOT used as fallback.

On SETTLEMENT_UNCONFIRMED buy: set position.pending_proceeds_sol = size_sol
after cash_sol debit and emit cash_sol_debited_pending event to make
phantom-debit risk observable. No reversal logic added.

Added tests/test_cash_sol_accounting.py: 4 focused tests.
Zero CU impact. No architecture changes.
notes_for_cursor: trader.py was re-implemented cleanly from HEAD. No stash used.
cursor_validation_result.json currently contains T-003 results — overwrite with T-004 validation output after running required_validation.
Expected test baseline after commit: 213 passed (209 + 4 new), 0 failed.
Do not modify discovery, Birdeye, or capacity logic during validation.
next_task_description: Debit reversal for SETTLEMENT_UNCONFIRMED buys that fail on-chain: startup recovery to detect pending_proceeds_sol > 0 and reverse cash_sol debit if tx failed
